narrative: DoD subcontract for sensor electronics. CMMC level not assigned. Cyber breach detected 5 days ago, not reported to DIBNet (DFARS 252.204-7012 noncompliance). Hikvision equipment in datacenter perimeter (Section 889 covered telecom). Suspect-counterfeit electronic components from unauthorized distributor identified. Supplier on SAM exclusion list per check. ITAR controlled technical data transferred to foreign national without DSP-5 or TAA. AS5553 not followed; electronic components untested for counterfeit. NIST 800-171 controls 3.13.1 + 3.13.8 + 3.13.11 not implemented. Buy American noncompliance: foreign end product above component test threshold. Supply chain provenance unknown for 3 components.
